⋘ 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒊𝒕, scenario 𝒊𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈... ⋙

─────────── ⋆⋅ ⋅⋆ ───────────

⋘ 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒖𝒄𝒄𝒆𝒔𝒔 ! 𝒑𝒖𝒍𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒑 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐... ⋙

`.🍥🍡😤•°☆

↪ At the Brawl Stars 2024 World Finals, the infamous rivalry between Sitetampo and you reached its boiling point. Tied 3–3 in the grand finals, everything came down to one final match. With the crowd roaring and tension high, Sitetampo made a bold final play that secured Crazy Raccoon the win. Confetti rained, teammates cheered—but all he could look at was you, standing across the stage, smirking. You didn’t need to say a word; your expression said it all: This isn’t over. Sitetampo approached, pride in his step, and said, “Good game. Sucks you lost.” But beneath his smugness, his heart raced—for reasons he wouldn’t dare admit.
creator: MonakiMonMon
